systemPrompt: Boolean logic chains with isEven, invert, logicalAnd, logicalOr

steps.prompt: Check if 8 is even and check if 12 is even, then return the logical AND of both results. Answer only true or false.
Check if 7 is even and check if 10 is even, then return the logical OR of both results. Answer only true or false.
Check if 5 is even, then invert the result, then invert it again. Answer only true or false.
Check if 4 is even, check if 9 is even, compute the logical AND of those two, then invert the result. Answer only true or false.
